Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

IKEY_X62_V_1_6

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74C
Recv ID: 76C
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 2F
Func Name: IKEY

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "A10",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 53248,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN communication inferiority"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 53264,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN initial diagnosis result inferiority"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42322,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "I-KEY internal abnormality"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42384,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Response NG from BCM"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42324,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Control unit has not learned any I-Key"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42325,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "FRONT LEFT Request SW stuck in active position"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42326,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "FRONT RIGHT Request SW stuck in active position"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42327,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Back Request SW stuck in active position"
  }
]
